name: HT7333-A Low-Power LDO 3.3V
description: Holtek HT7333-A ultra-low-power LDO, 3.3V 250mA output, 2.5uA quiescent, VIN up to 12V, SOT-89. Battery-project staple.
dimensions_source: Holtek HT73xx datasheet Rev 1.80 p.7: SOT-89 body 4.55x2.5, lead pitch 1.5, tab width 1.35-1.83, overall tab-to-lead 4.17. Land (leads 0.8x1.6 pitch 1.5, tab 2.0x1.6) derived per IPC-7351. Pinout p.2: 1 GND, 2 VIN(tab), 3 VOUT. NOTE: HT7333-1 is a different 30V family.
